query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A low-angle view looking up along the intersection of two building surfaces at night. A brightly lit white concrete facade extends diagonally from the lower right toward a deep blue sky, while a dark vertical wall or shadowed surface runs along the left edge. Dark horizontal rooflines or architectural structures break the skyline near the center, where a small rectangular orange light glows.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A low-angle view looking up along the intersection of two building surfaces at night, transformed by abstract graphic qualities and unconventional framing. A brightly lit white concrete facade extends diagonally from the lower right into a deep blue sky, while a near-pure black shadowed surface runs along the left edge, creating a stark geometric split. Dark horizontal rooflines break the skyline near the center where a small orange light glows, the scene reduced to flat planes of color and severe diagonal instability that disrupt ordinary architectural representation.
